---
title: "The Challenges"
subtitle: "Two set challenges we run live — plus a deeper menu to explore."
description: "The two featured AI challenges for the workshop — The Next Step and This is not a drill — with a full menu of other challenges to try."
---

<svg viewBox="0 0 800 220" width="100%" style="max-height:220px;display:block;margin:0 0 1.2rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f6f8fc,#eef3fb);border:1px solid #e2e8f4">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="g-challenges" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0891b2"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="#e11d6b"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7c3aed"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <!-- two featured tiles, linked -->
  <line x1="290" y1="110" x2="510" y2="110" stroke="url(#g-challenges)" stroke-width="2.5" opacity="0.8"/>
  <!-- tile 1: The next step (paper + magnifier) -->
  <g>
    <rect x="150" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="18" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#0891b2" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <text x="170" y="86" fill="#0891b2" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" letter-spacing="1.5">SET CHALLENGE 1</text>
    <rect x="172" y="104" width="40" height="42" rx="3" fill="none" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="180" y1="114" x2="204" y2="114" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="180" y1="122" x2="204" y2="122" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="180" y1="130" x2="196" y2="130" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="244" cy="118" r="13" fill="none" stroke="#0891b2" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <line x1="254" y1="128" x2="266" y2="140" stroke="#0891b2" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>
  <!-- tile 2: This is not a drill (alert) -->
  <g>
    <rect x="490" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="18" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#e11d6b" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <text x="510" y="86" fill="#e11d6b" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" letter-spacing="1.5">SET CHALLENGE 2</text>
    <path d="M570 104 L592 144 L548 144 Z" fill="none" stroke="#e11d6b" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <line x1="570" y1="116" x2="570" y2="132" stroke="#e11d6b" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="570" cy="139" r="2" fill="#e11d6b"/>
  </g>
  <circle cx="400" cy="110" r="5" fill="#7c3aed"/>
  <circle cx="318" cy="56" r="3" fill="#b91c1c"/>
</svg>

<div class="meta-row">
  <span class="pill rose">2 set challenges</span>
  <span class="pill cyan">35 min each</span>
  <span class="pill teal">collaborative · no one "wins"</span>
  <span class="pill violet">14 more to explore</span>
</div>

We run **two set challenges** live in the workshop. Each follows the same format: a short setup, a starter you can paste straight into any chatbot, a few rounds of iteration with your table, and a quick share-out. No two tables will arrive at the same answer — and that's the point.

## The two set challenges

<div class="card-grid">

<a class="lafb-card" href="the-next-step.qmd">
<h3>🔬 The next step. <span class="pill cyan">Set 1</span></h3>
<p>Use AI to understand a complex recent paper — then design the follow-up experiment that should come next.</p>
</a>

<a class="lafb-card" href="this-is-not-a-drill.qmd">
<h3>🚨 This is not a drill. <span class="pill rose">Set 2</span></h3>
<p>Use AI to understand a live federal rule change — and draft a public comment that an agency would actually have to weigh.</p>
</a>

</div>

<div class="box tip"><span class="box-label">Want more?</span> Beyond the two set challenges, there's a deeper menu — from a five-model comparison to standing up a multi-agent grant clinic. Browse <a href="other.qmd">Other Challenges →</a></div>

When you're ready, meet your tools in the <a href="../intro/tools.qmd">AI Toolkit</a>, or read <a href="../intro/overview.qmd">The Workshop</a> for how the 35-minute format works.
